title: Wazuh — Fleet

panels.title: Wazuh up
panels.description: 1 if at least one node's collection succeeded.

panels.title: Outdated agents
panels.description: Agents running an older version than the manager (cluster-wide). Per-daemon health is a node-level concern — see the "Wazuh — Node" dashboard.

panels.title: Nodes
panels.description: Each cluster node with its role and version.

panels.title: Config valid per node
panels.description: Whether each node's Wazuh configuration validates (from /cluster/configuration/validation).

panels.title: Events dropped /s by node
panels.description: Dropped events per node. Sustained > 0 means a node is overloaded.

panels.title: remoted events /s by node
panels.description: Agent events received by remoted, per node.

panels.title: Error / critical log rate by node
panels.description: Error+critical log lines per second, per node. (Per-daemon run state lives on the "Wazuh — Node" dashboard.)

description: Fleet-wide view of every Wazuh node: topology, per-node throughput comparison, health and cluster-wide agents. For a single-node deep dive, open "Wazuh — Node".
